refusal: Refuse the handwritten reminder as the default next repair. It is another bench-level memory aid compensating for a missing controlled instruction.
mechanism_reframe: The pattern is repeated local signal substitution: a sleeve note, a chalk board, a verbal handoff, and now a handwritten reminder each move the missing control point into fragile local artifacts. That preserves motion while allowing the upstream source of truth to remain incomplete.
upstream_next_action: Open an upstream source-of-truth correction: make the responsible owner define the missing cleaning interval in the controlled work/spec record before the next box is treated as releasable.
